name: memory
description: File-based project memory workflow for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md.

interface.shortDescription: Review context and update AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md.
interface.longDescription: File-based memory for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md. Selecting Memory/记忆 or saying @memory/@记忆 starts a compact review workflow: first show proposed global and current-project memory content, then ask for 1 current project, 2 global, 3 both, or 4 do not write. Writes use ordinary file editing after confirmation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the file-based Memory/记忆 workflow. If the user selects this plugin or says @memory/@记忆, immediately review the visible conversation and workspace context. Reply compactly: recommend scope, show Global memory bullets, show Current project memory bullets, then ask the user to choose 1 current project, 2 global, 3 both, or 4 do not write. Use ordinary file editing tools only after confirmation. If direct editing is unavailable, provide target paths and copy-ready Markdown. Do not include MCP, tool availability diagnostics, or implementation details unless the user asks.
